files_to_modify.reason: Add PlayerAction, AIAction, BattlePhase types; add playerPokemon, battlePhase, cursorIndex, sleepTurns fields to BattleState
Replace stub with full Gen 1 battle logic; export processTurn() pure function; keep BattleSystem class with input/menu navigation
Full battle screen layout: panels, HP/EXP bars, action/move menus, animations, status badges
Add playerPokemon (first non-fainted party member, defaulting to Bulbasaur if party empty) to BattleState initialization; set battlePhase to INTRO
Update BATTLE phase render to use TransitionRenderer.encounterFlash; pass updated BattleState to BattleRenderer

files_to_create.reason: Pure Gen 1 damage formula, STAB, critical hit, type effectiveness helpers; extracted to keep BattleSystem.ts under 150 lines
Status condition logic: paralysis per-turn check, poison/burn end-of-turn damage, sleep duration tracking, freeze thaw; extracted for size
Gen 1 catch rate formula, wobble count, 4-shake algorithm; extracted for size
EXP gain for wild/trainer battles, level-up threshold lookup per expGroup; extracted for size
AI selectMove() (random valid PP move), Struggle fallback definition; extracted for size
Frame-interpolated transitions: encounterFlash (scanline expand), fadeToBlack, badgeZoom
Enemy/player info panels, HP bar with animated drain, EXP bar with animated fill, status badge pills; extracted from BattleRenderer
Action menu (FIGHT/POKEMON/ITEM/RUN 2x2 grid) and move menu (4 moves with type badge + PP); extracted from BattleRenderer
Vitest tests for Gen 1 damage formula: specific matchup ranges, type effectiveness, immunity, critical hit
Vitest tests for battle logic: status conditions, PP tracking, stat stages, level-up events
Vitest tests for Gen 1 catch formula: catchRate values at various HP levels and ball types, wobble count

approach_rationale: Use existing class structures and extend them. Keep BattleSystem class as GameEngine entry point; add processTurn() as exported pure function alongside it. Minimize GameEngine changes. Use sub-module files to enforce size limits.

steps.action: Update BattleTypes.ts: add PlayerAction, AIAction, BattlePhase types; extend BattleState with playerPokemon, battlePhase, cursorIndex, sleepTurns
Create battle sub-modules: DamageCalc.ts, StatusEffects.ts, CatchSystem.ts, ExpSystem.ts, MoveSelection.ts
Replace BattleSystem.ts with full Gen 1 logic: processTurn() function + updated BattleSystem class for input/menu navigation
Create TransitionRenderer.ts with encounterFlash, fadeToBlack, badgeZoom
Create battle renderer sub-files: PanelRenderer.ts, MenuRenderer.ts
Replace BattleRenderer.ts with full layout (160x144 canvas): delegates to PanelRenderer and MenuRenderer; handles animation state internally
Update EncounterSystem.ts: set playerPokemon (create Bulbasaur Lv.5 as default), set battlePhase=INTRO, set sleepTurns={player:0, wild:0}
Update GameEngine.ts: handle TransitionRenderer for encounter flash in TRANSITION render phase; no logic changes to battle update path
Run npm test, verify all tests pass including existing ones

expected_tests: tests/damage-formula.test.ts: Bulbasaur Lv5 Tackle vs Rattata Lv3 → damage [3,5]
tests/damage-formula.test.ts: Charmander Lv10 Ember vs Bulbasaur Lv10 → super effective range
tests/damage-formula.test.ts: Water Gun vs Geodude → 2× effectiveness
tests/damage-formula.test.ts: Move vs immune type → 0 damage, BattleEvent IMMUNE
tests/battle-system.test.ts: Poison damage = floor(maxHp/16) per turn
tests/battle-system.test.ts: Sleep prevents action; wakes after duration
tests/battle-system.test.ts: PP decrements on move use; all PP=0 → Struggle
tests/battle-system.test.ts: +1 Attack stage → 1.5× multiplier in damage
tests/battle-system.test.ts: MEDIUM_FAST Lv4 gains enough EXP → LEVEL_UP event
tests/catch-formula.test.ts: Rattata full HP Pokeball → modifiedRate < 100
tests/catch-formula.test.ts: Rattata half HP Great Ball → mid-range

risk_areas.mitigation: Add new fields with defaults; ensure EncounterSystem always populates them; check existing test assertions

risk_areas.risk: playerPokemon party system incomplete - no UUID→PokemonInstance lookup
risk_areas.mitigation: Default to Bulbasaur Lv.5 for MVP; note limitation in code comments
Implement as Math.random() >= 0.25 → paralyzed to match test spec exactly
Use formula as specified in task: floor(catchRate*(3*max-2*cur)/(3*max))*ballBonus; test verifies specific values

risk_areas.risk: BattleRenderer animation state (requestAnimationFrame vs game loop)
risk_areas.mitigation: Use game-loop based animation with Date.now() timestamps stored in BattleRenderer instance

risk_areas.risk: File size limit (150 lines) for complex systems
risk_areas.mitigation: Split into sub-modules under src/game/systems/battle/ and src/game/renderers/battle/
Keep existing message format in startEncounter; don't change the message template

persistence_strategy: Game state persists via existing SaveSystem (localStorage). PokemonInstance for player created fresh each session (MVP limitation - party persistence system incomplete). Wild Pokemon created at encounter time. Battle state is in-memory for duration of battle only.
error_handling_approach: BattleSystem.processTurn() handles null/undefined state gracefully. EncounterSystem.startEncounter() already has try/catch. GameEngine already has error recovery with red screen. BattleRenderer renders 'Loading...' fallback when battle state is null.
